Hey Jordan Belphodia, the Wolf of Wall Street and welcome to Straight Line Sales Certification version 4.0, an interactive online training solution for becoming a world-class closer and a top producer in your field. That's a bold statement to make right out of the gate, but here's the deal. I've been teaching the Straight Line system for almost 30 years now, it's been 3 decades and over that time I've taken literally millions of sales from all over the world, from every industry imaginable and turn them into world-class closes in an incredibly short period of time. How short? Well, that kind of depends on how quickly you go through the training, but we're talking about a matter of weeks here, not months, and that's even if you put your training on the slow track. And the reason for that is that one of the true beauties of the Straight Line system is it has a very high good enough factor as the phrase goes, which means that even when you're just becoming reasonably proficient at applying it, you'll still get excellent results. But I'm jumping ahead now. Before we get to the actual specifics of your training, I first want to tell you a bit more about myself and also find some more about you. See with this latest version of the system 4.0, it's fully interactive, which means that you and I can actually have a dialogue with each other. It's supposed to be just talk, talk, talking to you for the rest of the training while you're basically sit there in your seat, listening passively and struggle to keep your eyes open. Instead, I'm going to be asking you questions at strategic intervals and you'll give me your answers in real time. And then based on those answers, the system's learning algorithm will adjust the content you see, which will allow you to learn at a highly accelerated rate. It's powerful stuff, believe me. And sometimes here I'll be asking you a question you'll notice for no other reason. Just make sure that I still have your complete attention. You see, as exciting and captivating as I know I am as a speaker, I'm great, right? Every major adult learning study out there, it shows that if you don't engage in a back and forth of someone every few minutes, their retention rate starts to fall through the floor. So in light of that, even if one of my questions seems a bit random, it's still important that you play full outlet. Meaning, when the boxes pop up with the possible answers on your screen, don't roll your eyes, don't take a coffee break, don't phone a friend. Just click on the appropriate box as soon as you see it and you have your answer and continue on with the training. Just trust me, this interactivity is a major leap forward in terms of your ability to use the online version of the straight line system to achieve those same massive results that it's become so famous for all over the world, but only typically through live training. Now you can do it online. Get it? So let's give it a whirl right now. Starting my first question, which is, have you seen the movie, The Wolf of Wall Street? Now go ahead and click on the appropriate box and I'll show you what happens next. That's one more point here, real quick, I told you right, is that when you make your choice and you hear that clicking sound, right, you're locked in. The video will continue to play for a few more seconds as I finish out my thought and then it will automatically route you to the correct video based on your answer. That's what the learning algorithm is sort of, it routes you to a different video. So don't worry if it keeps playing after you make your choice, you don't have to keep clicking, click once you hear that sound. You know you're done and boom, you'll be automatically around to the right video. All right, so do that right now if you haven't done it already. Awesome. So here's the deal. By clicking on that box, the learning algorithm has routed you to a shortened version of my backstory in order to save time. In other words, as entertaining as my story might be, and it surely is, right, telling it to you right now won't do anything to enhance the outcome of your training. What it will do though is cause you to burn through five or 10 minutes of your precious time and we could have used that to move forward in the training. So let's join the other group right now as the near the end of my backstory. Really you haven't, okay, well that's totally fine. It's definitely not for everyone, especially if you're offended by, you know, pretty much all things Karnal and the F-bomb and copious drug use. But either way, well I'm not proud of a lot of those aspects of my former life, what I am very proud of is the fact that I'm sober now for almost 22 years and I'm in a relationship with one amazing woman for the last 10 of them. So I can look back now in that portion of my life with perspective, knowing that I live it in pretty much the exact opposite way today. Whatever the case though, I'm sure that you're at least a little bit curious as to why Leonardo de Caprio wanted to portray me in a movie in my modest Scorsese, we want to direct that movie, right? Well, the short G-rated version of the story is that in the late 1980s, well still in my early 20s, I took control of a tiny brokerage for a name Stratton-Opemont, which at the time employed a bunch of barely post-adolescent nincompoops, for lack of a better phrase, who could barely close a door and I turned them into the most effective sales force in Wall Street history hands down using a seemingly magical sales trading system that came to be known as straight line sales and persuasion. In fact, it was a system that turned out to be so powerful and effective and so easy to learn that within literally days of inventing it, I could take virtually any human being regardless of their age, race, their creed, their color, their socioeconomic background, their educational status, their level of natural sales ability and turn them into a world-class closer almost instantly. Now what happened next was, well, the short story is that basically a rise and fall of biblical proportions. But before I go any further here, let's bring back in the yes group so we can all join together. All right, we're all back together again in the same training. Now here's the deal. Going forward, I won't be making any more comments like this about the interactivity. It'll be totally seamless to you. Just always remember how crucial it is to accelerate your learning. So whenever you see those little boxes pop up at the bottom of your screen, click on them quickly, please. Okay? So here's the deal. Getting back to the story, with a matter of days of inventing the straight line system, I was able to take those first 12 stratnats, as I like to call themselves, and put them on a pace to earn over a million dollars a year in the first 30 days. And of course, as word of this began to spread, thousands of young kids started pouring into stratnats' boardroom, looking to hop on the so-called straight line gravy train and stake their claim in the American dream. Now for the most part, these kids were basically the sad forgotten spawn of America's working class families. In other words, they were no members of the lucky sperm from walking through my door, and there was a single Ivy League diploma among them. I'm talking about kids here who had barely clawed their way out of high school, and were never told by their parents that they were capable of greatness. In fact, any greatness they naturally had in them had been literally conditioned out of them since the day they were born. First by their parents, then by their schoolteachers, then by their own friends, by their media, in fact, but it kind of made it into my boardroom they'd been conditioned to survive, not to thrive, but none of that mattered anymore. Now unfortunately, there was also a dark side to all this precocious success. See, the system turned out to be almost too effective. It started spitting out freshly minted millenias, it's such a ferocious clip, they ended up skipping over the typical life struggles that most young adults go through that serve to build their character. The result? It was success without respect, wealth without restraint, and power without responsibility. And just like that, things began to spiral way out of control. It was like one of those tropical storms off the coast of Africa, like you see on the Weather Channel. It uses the warm waters of the Atlantic to grow and build and strengthen and mutate until it reaches a point of such critical mass it destroys everything in its wake. Well guess what? In the case of Stratton, it used the power of the straight line system to grow and build and strengthen and mutate and it followed the same trajectory, destroying everything in its path as well, including me. In fact, by the time it was over, I'd lost everything, my money, my pride, my dignity, my self-respect, my children for a time, and of course, my freedom. Now obviously, this story doesn't end there, and really how could it? I mean, how could a system that created that much wealth and success for anyone who learned it simply fade away into obscurity? It couldn't, and obviously it didn't. Now it started with the thousands of extra-Titanites who left the firm, began spending a watered-down, diluted version to about a dozen or so different industries. Yet no matter where they went or how watered-down that version was, all the struggling sales person had to do was learn a fraction of it and it was enough for them to not a top producer, but a solid producer. Then I got involved. My God, Bob. See, I'm the heel of two best-selling books and the runaway success of the Wolf of Wall Street movie, which by the way, actually ended with Leo teaching the straight-line system on stage, doing this whole sell-me-this-pen business. I have a clip running for you right here. You can check it out here, but don't leave. Not now. Watch it later. Anyway, on the heels of that, I began spreading an undiluted version across the entire world from Wall Street to Main Street and everywhere in between. And here's the deal. As amazing as the results have been that first time around, this time they were even better. See, before I began teaching the system again, I spent two full years going line by line through its code, taking every last nuance and pushing it to even a higher level of operational proficiency while also ensuring that first and foremost, it was grounded in the highest level of ethics and integrity. Things like high-pressure sales tactics, manipulative language patterns, or even the slightest reference to closing a sale at any cost to earn a commission, they were all purged from the system in favor of more elegant and more ethical strategies. In fact, I even brought in experts from the outside to review the system, everyone from occupational psychologists to experts in content creation, best adult learning practice, and neuro-linguistic programming. And here's the deal. What emerged in its place was something truly incredible, a system that was so powerful and effective and that maintained such a high level of ethics and integrity that I knew in my heart that the straight line system had finally evolved into what I always knew it could be, a money-making force for good. So what you have before you now in the following learning modules is a turnkey solution for applying the straight line system to your specific industry. I'm going to show you how to quickly discover your strengths as a salesperson and then massively build on them while also identifying your weaknesses and quickly shoring them up so you start closing more sales in a more elegant and stress-free fashion and also become a top producer in your field. So with that, let's move on to the next part of the introduction where I'll explain how to get the most out of your training. Then we'll have one more quick talk about ethics and integrity and then we'll do a deep dive into the five core elements of the straight line system. I'll see you there.
